meta.title: New course with Google: Pair Programming with a Large Language Model
meta.description:
Enroll today: https://bit.ly/46fh1Mj

Learn how to use LLMs to enhance, debug, understand, and document your code in this new course built in collaboration with Google, and taught by Laurence Moroney.

By using LLMs as pair programmers, you can get quick and effective assistance on a wide range of tasks, from catching bugs to integrating complete code snippets.

In this course, you’ll gain access to the PaLM API and get hands-on experience that will prepare you to use an LLM to:

- Simplify and improve your code
- Write test cases 
- Debug and refactor your code
- Reduce technical debt
- Explain and document complex code written in any coding language 

Ready to take the next step toward becoming a more productive software engineer?

Learn more:  https://bit.ly/46fh1Mj
